---
title: "Landmarks of History 1. Ancient History from the Earliest Times to the Mahometan Conquest. By the author of “The Kings of England.”"
---

## Landmarks of History 1. Ancient History from the Earliest Times to the Mahometan Conquest. By the author of “The Kings of England.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1852
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, Paternoster Row, London; J.H. Parker, Oxford; and 337, Strand; London; and Joseph Masters, 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
